title: Has anyone ever watched End of Evangelion on LSD
display_title: Has anyone ever watched End of Evangelion on LSD
wikitext:
[]: Has anyone ever watched End of Evangelion on LSD? Post by chaosakita » Mon Oct 28, 2013 2:19 am My friend and I were thinking of trying this soon. How does it sound?

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Oct 28, 2013 2:48 am Well, you are notionally of an age to be a responsible adult, so on (in) your own head be it. If you can get decent acid these days -- from what I hear, the real stuff doesn't get made any more because the precursors are not so readily available. I was sure we had a "watching while high" thread somewhere -- maybe in the Graveyard. The nearest I found was this -- http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/11317/I-only-watch-Evangelion-when-Im-drunk/

Article: Has anyone ever watched End of Evangelion on LSD
[]: Has anyone ever watched End of Evangelion on LSD? Post by chaosakita » Mon Oct 28, 2013 2:19 am My friend and I were thinking of trying this soon. How does it sound?

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Oct 28, 2013 2:48 am Well, you are notionally of an age to be a responsible adult, so on (in) your own head be it. If you can get decent acid these days -- from what I hear, the real stuff doesn't get made any more because the precursors are not so readily available. I was sure we had a "watching while high" thread somewhere -- maybe in the Graveyard. The nearest I found was this -- http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/11317/I-only-watch-Evangelion-when-Im-drunk/
